title: Sterbottensost and Resinous Cheese Bake
description: A rich and savory bake featuring the unique flavors of Sterbottensost and resinous cheese, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Sterbottensost cheese and resinous cheese.
Add the cubed rye bread to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the diced Ukrainian sausage and dried bake to the mixture, stirring until well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
